intent: Write a buying brief on dorm-room essentials for an incoming college freshman working with $300. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen, office-products, and health-household categories and collect at least 5 products (bedding/storage, small appliance, desk gear, toiletries organizer, and one laundry item). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/personalfinance for posts on what dorm items students regret buying, multi-use hacks, or things the dorm provides anyway. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present a prioritized $300 kit with running totals, (b) include a 'skip this' section that directly cites community warnings, (c) flag any highly rated storefront item that is redundant per the Reddit posts, (d) close with a 3-item 'move-in day must haves' list. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Shopping (home-kitchen + office-products + health-household) + Reddit (LifeProTips + personalfinance). 3-category shopping walk, budget allocation.
